EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITemporalRecordSet

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to methods needed to set up and fill a temporally sorted record set.

[Guid("78C74302-17CF-11D5-B7CF-00010265ADC5")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITemporalRecordSet

Properties

CacheFeatures

Controls whether features are cached in the renderer's feature memory or are read from the feature class.

bool CacheFeatures { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Count

Number of features contained by the cursor.

int Count { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureCacheWindow

Determines the number of features to cache if FeaturesCached property is true.

int FeatureCacheWindow { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureClass

A reference to the feature class of which this record set is a member.

IFeatureClass FeatureClass { get; set; }

Property Value

IFeatureClass

Examples

Sample Snippet

MostCurrentFeature

Returns success, but does nothing.

object MostCurrentFeature { get; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

OldestFeature

Returns success, but does nothing.

object OldestFeature { get; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

TemporalColumnName

Identifies the column containing time and date information.

string TemporalColumnName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

TimeSeriesColumnName

Identifies column in the feature class containing temporal observations with time series.

string TimeSeriesColumnName { get; set; }

Property Value

string
